ddt:Target.Name: Sunroof_x95_B2
ddt:Target.Description:
Projet X95
MàJ : 07 march 2007
1ere Edition : 06 march 2007
Pilote Developpement Electronique : Chandara SAR tel: 33056
Base Edition : Diag des Systèmes, Eric Lefèvre

Data.Name: Numéro d'ordre de fabrication de la journée

Item.Text: Débuter
Demande de statut

Data.Name: DTC

Item.Text: Sensors Alimentation in shortcut to GND at the Front and the Rear Sensors
Sensors Alimentation in shortcut to 12V or 5V at the Front and the Rear Sensors
Under Voltage at the LBCS Card
Over Voltage at the LBCS Card
EEPROM defect at the LBCS Card
Sensors Initialisation (Calibration) undone or failed at the Front and the Rear Sensors
Configuration undone or failed
Signal in shortcut to 12V or 5V at the Front Sensor
Signal in shortcut to ground or in open load at the Front Sensor
Signal out of range at the Front Sensor
Signal in shortcut to 12V or 5V at the Rear Sensor
Signal in shortcut to ground or in open load at the Rear Sensor
Signal out of range at the Rear Sensor
LIN default at the Right EDL
Under Voltage at the Right EDL
Motor or Driver failure at the Right EDL
LIN default at the Left EDL
Under Voltage at the Left EDL
Motor or Driver failure at the Left EDL
LIN default at the Right LISA
Under Voltage at the Right LISA
Over Voltage at the Right LISA
Position sensor failure at the Right LISA
Motor or Driver failure at the Right LISA
Stuck (MBLstate different from 00 and 11) at the Right LISA
LIN default at the Left LISA
Under Voltage at the Left LISA
Over Voltage at the Left LISA
Position sensor failure at the Left LISA
Motor or Driver failure at the Left LISA
Stuck (MBLstate different from 00 and 11) at the Left LISA
Data from CAN HS invalid at the CAN
Frames from CAN HS miss at the CAN
CAN H or CAN L in shortcut or open load at the CAN
Frames from BCM miss at the CAN
Bus OFF at the CAN
Frame SWA CANHS miss at the CAN
Data from SWA CANHS invalid at the CAN
ECU Mute at the CAN
Effacé en attente de validation
Mémorisé au cycle précédent
Mémorisé
Présent et mémorisé
Non validé en attente de référencement
Mémorisé au cycle précédent + Alerte IHM disparue
Mémorisé + Alerte IHM disparue
Présent et mémorisé + Alerte IHM présente

Frame missing
Invalide data
Motor driver failure
Confiuration defect
Initialisation failure
Position sensor failure
EEPROM defect
Signal out of range
Over voltage
Under voltage
Shortcut to GND or open load signal
Shortcut to 12 V or 5 V
Shortcut to GND
LIN failure
Bus OFF

Data.Name: SessionName
Data.Description:
Certains services sont interdits dans certains modes de diagnostics

(ex:ReadMemoryByAddress interdit au SAV)

Le mode de fonctionnement par défaut avant l'envoi d'une requête

"StartDiagnosticSession" est le mode Après Vente

format données:

10 00

| |_______ A0 pour le mode Diagnostic Etudes

| B0 pour le mode Diagnostic Contrôles en chaîne

| C0 pour le mode Diagnostic Après Vente

| 80 pour le mode Diag Fournisseur

|

|_________octet requête "StartDiagnosticSession"

Item.Text: Default Session
Development Mode
Extended diagnostic
Not Allowed
Start Temporary
Start Permanent
Move SunRoof
Move SunRoof to Pinch event
Effacé en attente de validation
Mémorisé au cycle précédent
Mémorisé
Présent et mémorisé
Non validé en attente de référencement
Mémorisé au cycle précédent + Alerte IHM disparue
Mémorisé + Alerte IHM disparue
Présent et mémorisé + Alerte IHM présente
Component Failures
Bus Signal / Message Failures
Mechanical Failures
Algorithm Based Failures
System Programming Failures
System Internal Failures
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
General Signal Failures
General Electrical Failures
General Failure Information
Vehicle manufacturer / System supplier specific
CAN Bus
CAN HS
Data from SWA CAN HS
Frame SWA CAN HS
Front Sensor
Left EDL
Left LISA
Rear Sensor
Right EDL
Right LISA
CAN ECU Mute

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Item.Text: Renault R1
Nissan N1
Nissan N2
Nissan N3
Renault R3
S/R closed.
Tilt position 1
Slide position 1
Slide position 2
Slide position 3
Not used
Not used too
sunroof switch not connected
sunroof switch error
No AP failure
1 (one) AP failure
2 (two) AP Failure
3 (three) AP Failure
4 (four) AP Failure
5 (five) AP Failure
6 (six) AP Failure
7 (seven) AP Failure
more than 7 AP Failure

Data.Name: OutputOptionalParameter
Data.Comment: Optional paramaeter for I/O Control Sunroof

Data.Name: OutputOptionalParameter_SR
Data.Comment: Optional paramaeter for I/O Control Sunroof

Item.Text: tilt 1
slide 1
slide 2
slide 3
not used

Data.Name: OutputOptionalParameter_AP
Data.Comment: Optional paramaeter for I/O Control Sunroof

Item.Text: tilt position pinch event
slide position pinch event
High Effort Detection
Perform routine requested
Status request
Not Allowed
Routine in progress
Routine icompleted and OK
Routine icompleted and NOT OK
Not Allowed
Routine in progress
Routine icompleted and OK
Routine icompleted and NOT OK

Request.Name: Lecture de la traçabilité du calculateur
Request.Comment: Permet de lire les informations de traçabilité du calculateur

DataItem.Name: Numéro d'ordre de fabrication de la journée

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Spécification du type de diagnostic désiré

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

Request.Name: Ecriture VIN
Request.Comment: Service d'écriture du code VIN dans l'UCE. Non accessible après mise à feu

Request.Name: High Effort Detection
Request.Comment: Permet de connaître l'état des fonctions correction dynamique et code relevé
